project.name: AI 交易终端
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Crypto trading terminal, dark mode, emerald green primary, mono numbers, high data density, command-center aesthetic with status indicators and risk signals
project.designRead: Dashboard / crypto trader / industrial utilitarian / high density / avoid purple neon and generic card walls

colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single primary hue (emerald); long=green, short=red for direction; state colors for semantic status only

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: radius sm=4px, md=6px, lg=8px; sharp utilitarian cards with subtle borders, no soft/rounded shapes
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter for UI labels, JetBrains Mono for all numbers/prices/data values; tabular-nums on all numeric displays; tight tracking on mono numbers
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: compact spacing (4px base); tight padding on cards and controls; high information density
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: thin-bordered cards on dark surface layers; status dots with glow; badge-style grade/direction tags; ghost buttons for secondary actions
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first depth model; 4 background layers from #0a0b0e to #21252f; static surfaces use borders not shadows; only floating layers (modal/dropdown) use shadow-lg
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: no decorative images; all visuals are data-driven (charts, status indicators, sparklines); icon-only for navigation
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: precise, minimal feedback; hover reveals subtle bg change; no animations on data displays; status changes are instant color shifts

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: left sidebar navigation with icon+label, active state via emerald green highlight; top-right status bar with Kill Switch indicator and Execution Mode toggle
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: emerald green (#10b981) for primary actions, success states, and active nav; red (#ef4444) for short/danger/error
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Inter for all text; JetBrains Mono for numbers, prices, amounts; tabular-nums on all numeric data; sizes: xs=11, sm=12, base=13, md=14, lg=16
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: sm=4px (buttons, badges), md=6px (cards, inputs), lg=8px (panels, modals)
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: 4-layer bg: base #0a0b0e, surface #111318, elevated #1a1d25, overlay #21252f; cards use surface bg + 1px border-default; no shadow on static cards
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: btn-primary: emerald bg, dark text, sm radius, sm font; btn-ghost: transparent, border, secondary text; btn-danger: red muted bg, red text
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: compact padding (12-16px inside cards); 8px gap between grid cards; consistent 24px section spacing; left-aligned labels, right-aligned numbers

privateRegions: dashboard main content area with KPI cards, positions table, opportunity summary, AI market summary
trade plans main content with plan list, create form, plan detail
risk center main content with risk status, config management, kill switch, event log

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Dark crypto terminal with emerald green primary, JetBrains Mono for data, Inter for UI, compact 4-layer surface system, border-first depth

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.businessScenario: System overview: account equity, PnL, risk status, active positions, candidate opportunities, AI summary
pages.visualNorthStar: Mission control dashboard: a grid of compact data panels with glowing status indicators, tabular numbers in mono font, and emerald/red color coding for positive/negative values
pages.compositionPattern: Dashboard Grid: top KPI row (4 metric cards) + 2-column body (positions table left, opportunity + AI summary right)
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with emerald active state
mono numbers for all financial data
qualityRisks: high data density must remain scannable
privateRegions: dashboard main content area with KPI cards, positions table, opportunity summary, AI market summary

pages.title: Trade Plans
pages.businessScenario: Trade plan management: create plans with entry/stop/TP, run risk checks, view sizing results, manage plan lifecycle
pages.visualNorthStar: Split-panel trading workstation: left panel is a dense sortable plan list with grade badges and status tags, right panel switches between create form and plan detail with sizing/risk/decision result cards
pages.compositionPattern: Split-panel: 1/3 left list + 2/3 right detail/form, no hero, all functional panels
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with emerald active state
qualityRisks: form field density must remain usable
sizing result cards need clear visual hierarchy
privateRegions: trade plans main content with plan list, create form, plan detail

pages.title: Risk Center
pages.businessScenario: Risk control center: risk configuration, account risk state, Kill Switch, Execution Mode, risk intercept events, config version management
pages.visualNorthStar: Red-amber-graded risk command center: prominent Kill Switch toggle with red glow when active, risk gauges, config version timeline, and a scrollable event log with severity-coded rows
pages.compositionPattern: Top risk status summary row + 2-column body (config management left, event log right), prominent Kill Switch card at top
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with emerald active state
qualityRisks: Kill Switch must be visually prominent
config version table must be scannable
privateRegions: risk center main content with risk status, config management, kill switch, event log
